ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reservoirs" (
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservoir */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "reservoir_unit" TEXT /* Reservoir unit designation */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the reservoir is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the reservoir */,
  "basin_name" TEXT /* Name of the basin */,
  "tectonic_regime" TEXT /* Tectonic regime affecting the reservoir */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the reservoir */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the reservoir */,
  "operator_company" TEXT /* Company operating the reservoir */,
  "onshore_offshore" TEXT /* Type of operation (onshore/offshore) */,
  "hydrocarbon_type" TEXT /* Type of hydrocarbon present (e.g., oil, gas) */,
  "reservoir_status" TEXT /* Current status of the reservoir (e.g., mature, rejuvenating) */,
  "structural_setting" TEXT /* Structural setting of the reservoir */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the reservoir in meters */,
  "period" TEXT /* Geological period associated with the reservoir */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the reservoir was discovered */,
  "discovery_well" TEXT /* Name of the well that first discovered the reservoir */,
  "reservoir_volume" REAL /* Estimated volume of the reservoir */,
  "recovery_factor" REAL /* Estimated recovery factor of the reservoir */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production is expected to end */,
  "environmental_compliance" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the reservoir operations comply with environmental regulations */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body overseeing the reservoir */,
  "gis_data" TEXT /* Geographic information system (GIS) data for mapping and spatial analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservoir_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated reservoir */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross measurement of the reservoir */,
  "netpay" REAL /* Net pay measurement of the reservoir */,
  "porosity" REAL /* Porosity percentage of the reservoir */,
  "permeability" REAL /* Permeability measurement of the reservoir */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were measured */,
  "water_cut" REAL /* Percentage of water in the produced fluid */,
  "oil_production_rate" REAL /* Rate of oil production */,
  "gas_production_rate" REAL /* Rate of gas production */,
  "water_injection_rate" REAL /* Rate of water injection for enhanced oil recovery */,
  "gas_injection_rate" REAL /* Rate of gas injection for enhanced oil recovery */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in the reservoir */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in the reservoir */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_metrics_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)
column_names: Country where the reservoir is located
Type of hydrocarbon present (e.g., oil, gas)
Current status of the reservoir (e.g., mature, rejuvenating)
Depth of the reservoir in meters
Geological period associated with the reservoir
Date when the reservoir was discovered
Name of the well that first discovered the reservoir
Estimated recovery factor of the reservoir
Date when production is expected to end
Flag indicating whether the reservoir operations comply with environmental regulations
Geographic information system (GIS) data for mapping and spatial analysis
Unique identifier for each metric entry
Net pay measurement of the reservoir
Date when the metrics were measured
Percentage of water in the produced fluid
Rate of water injection for enhanced oil recovery
Rate of gas injection for enhanced oil recovery
